title: Silk Route Home Black Granite Chopping Board 40 x 30cm
features: Perfect for any kitchen the granite chopping board is an essential feature in any food preparation station.
Multipurpose, built to last and designed for kitchen use, high quality and durable 100% granite heat resistant up to 240.C, lightweight and portable can double up as a serving tray.
Prevents damage for your worktops and creates a flat surface, perfect for all your slicing dicing and chopping needs.
Unique – patterns may vary, handmade 100% natural stone is strong, sturdy, and heavy duty, blends with any décor.
Hygienic, waterproof, non-porous and stain resistant, made for everyday kitchen tasks.
description: Product Description Why Choose Silk Route's Chopping Boards 1. Versatile Style Perfect for any kitchen, our chopping boards combine functionality with style, making them an essential part of your food preparation station. 2. Kitchen Counter Protection Protect your countertops with a durable chopping board that’s perfect for all your slicing, dicing, and chopping needs. 3. Top Quality Built to withstand daily use, these boards combine durability with easy maintenance, making them a reliable and essential addition to any kitchen. 4. Collection Discover the range of durable and stylish chopping boards, from acacia wood, glass, marble and granite. From Our Kitchen To Yours At the heart of everything we do is our passion for quality. We've spent countless hours sourcing the finest ingredients from around the globe to bring you premium products delivered straight to your door. Explore our ever-expanding collection of spices and kitchenware, including our bestselling Himalayan Pink Salts, Granite Pestle & Mortars, and the latest must-have tools for your kitchen. Experience the difference that quality makes, and elevate your cooking with the best.
